case_title: IVAN RIVERA VS. OIL CHANGER, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-13-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OIL CHANGER, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-02-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-02-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN (506). PLAINTIFF IVAN RIVERA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT OIL CHANGER, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY TONY CAMPBELL. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIVERA, IVAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OIL CHANGER, INC. $0. THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT DEMONSTRATE THAT DEFENDANT INSTALLED AN INCORRECT PLUG OR OTHERWISE DAMAGED PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE DOING THE OIL CHANGE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT OIL CHANGER, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RIVERA, IVAN AS TO DEFENDANT OIL CHANGER, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIVERA, IVAN AS TO DEFENDANT OIL CHANGER, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
